name: spatula
description: AI-powered intelligent web crawling platform — describe the data you want, get clean production-ready datasets

scripts.generate:notices:
license-checker-rseidelsohn --excludePrivatePackages --production --markdown --start apps/api --out THIRD_PARTY_NOTICES.md --customPath scripts/notices-template.json && node -e "const fs=require('fs');const h='<!-- AUTO-GENERATED: Do not edit manually. Regenerate with \`pnpm run generate:notices\`. Must be regenerated on every release cut (LEGAL-04). -->

# Third-Party Notices

Auto-generated list of third-party production dependencies and their licenses.
Regenerate with \`pnpm run generate:notices\` before each release (LEGAL-04).

---

';const body=fs.readFileSync('THIRD_PARTY_NOTICES.md','utf8');if(!body.startsWith('<!--')){fs.writeFileSync('THIRD_PARTY_NOTICES.md',h+body)}"
